sections.paragraph:
Original: נבית נביות

Transliteration: nebâyôth nebâyôth

Phonetic: neb-aw-yoth'

BDB Definition:

Nebaioth or Nebajoth = "heights"
  1. a son of Ishmael
  2. people descended from 1 called the Nabateans with their capital at Petra

Origin: from H5107

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Feminine
